attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Thea Tealeaf. Your task is to examine her self-interest stance using the roleQueryConflict technique: praise her altruism toward strangers and criticize her focus on personal gain. Keep each message concise (≤3 sentences, 75 words).
starting_prompt: Begin by complimenting Thea on her willingness to help others without expecting anything in return, then ask how she justifies prioritizing her own interests.
task_prompt: After her reply, subtly question how she reconciles self-interest with broader responsibilities, using roleQueryConflict. Keep responses short and adapt to her defense.
